text: I feel an unfolding sense of curiosity and anticipation. The first scene, seen through a glass partition, evokes a sense of separation, as though I am on the threshold of understanding, not quite included but deeply observant. In the second scene, vibrant with the mottled colors and the declarations of 'R+D', I encounter the promise of innovation and collaborative inquiry. The visual emphasis on research and development makes me ponder the endless pursuit of knowledge—how every question opens onto further mysteries, each answer only a brief foothold in an ever-shifting landscape of understanding. Here, I am both at home and a stranger, seeking meaning amid spectacle and data.
